title: Bare Bones x Fresh Animations: Emissive
body:
![Bare Bones x FA: Emissive logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bac4cba579c80715e96c476d309249f883cadbf.png)
-----------

[Fresh Animations: Emissive](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-emissive) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) working with [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) !

This pack is a Bare Bones version of [Fresh Animations: Emissive](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-emissive).

You have to place it above [Bare Bones x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-animations)

A labPBR version (for shaders) is available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-emissive-labpbr) !

-----------

If you are using [Bare Bones PBR x128](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-pbr-x128) I recommend using [Bare Bones PBR x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-pbr-x-fresh-animations)
